constraint: B1 > A2: B1 fires on 5G candidate RSRPc > B1 (add SCell); A2 fires on 5G serving RSRPs < theta_A2 (remove SCell). B1=-115 < A2=-96 -> overlap zone -> persistent 5G SCell loop

A1 >= A2: A2 fires on PCell RSRPs < A2 -> start inter-freq measurement; A1 fires on PCell RSRPs > A1 -> stop inter-freq measurement. 4G SCells added/removed as side effect via A3/A5. A1 < A2 -> persistent 4G SCell loop
Mutual A4 handover thresholds create simultaneous-firing zone between two neighbors (RSRP > -106dBm for both cells)
reason: Cross-cell (need to compare two neighboring cells)

constraint: Every reachable SCell frequency must have a configured MeasObject
threshServingLowQ configured without NeighThreshHigh-RSRQ -> defaults to -inf -> handoff to inaccessible cell
Inter-freq MeasObject requires measGapConfig
threshServingLowP > a1-Threshold -> IDLE reselects where CONNECTED deems serving GOOD -> oscillation
t310 x n311: T310 must allow n311 in-sync recovery counts
drx-onDurationTimer < drx-LongCycleLength: PDCCH monitoring window must be shorter than DRX cycle
drx-RetransmissionTimerDL > drx-HARQ-RTT-TimerDL: UE sleeps before HARQ retransmission arrives
a1-Threshold (RSRP) <-> a2-Threshold (RSRQ): A1 and A2 must use same metric -> simultaneous firing under interference
MeasObjectEUTRA + measGapConfig must co-exist for Event B2
Inter-freq MeasObjectNR requires measGapConfig
Inter-RAT MeasObjectEUTRA requires measGapConfig
Every measId must reference valid measObjectId + reportConfigId
ReportConfigInterRAT must pair with MeasObjectEUTRA, not MeasObjectNR
QuantityConfig must define filter coefficients for all quantities active in reportQuantityCell (RSRP:true, SINR:true, RSRQ:false)
RLF-TimersAndConstants requires RadioLinkMonitoringConfig with RLM-RS
BeamFailureRecoveryConfig requires BFD resources in RadioLinkMonitoringConfig
BeamFailureRecoveryConfig requires dedicated BWP-UplinkDedicated
CSI-RS RLM detection resource must exist in CSI-MeasConfig
Inter-RAT reselection priority in SIB1 requires SIB5 to be broadcast
q-RxLevMin < s-IntraSearchP (Srxlev cell-suitability ordering)
threshServingLowQ must be configured lower than a1-Threshold so that a serving cell considered low-quality for IDLE reselection is not simultaneously treated as good-quality for A1.
threshX-HighQ must be configured higher than threshX-LowQ so that the higher-priority reselection threshold is above the lower-priority one.
The A1 serving-cell quality threshold should be configured higher (better) than the aN-Threshold1-r13 serving-cell quality threshold.
For Event A5, a5-Threshold1 (serving) must be set lower than a5-Threshold2-v1250 (neighbour) so a valid trigger window exists.
t310 must be long enough relative to n311 so the required in-sync indications can be received before t310 expires.
drx-onDurationTimer must be shorter than drx-LongCycleLength so the UE has a distinct sleep period within each DRX cycle.
drx-RetransmissionTimerDL should be longer than drx-HARQ-RTT-TimerDL so the UE stays available for the HARQ retransmission.
q-RxLevMin must be lower than threshServingLowP so a cell can first be suitable and only later be treated as low quality.
s-IntraSearchP should be above q-RxLevMin so the UE starts intra-frequency reselection measurements before the serving cell becomes unsuitable.
threshX-HighP must be higher than threshX-LowP for inter-frequency reselection priority ordering.
For E-UTRA inter-RAT idle/inactive reselection, threshX-High must be strictly higher than threshX-Low.
b1-ThresholdEUTRA (E-UTRA neighbour add) should not be lower than a2-Threshold (serving remove).
For Event B2, b2-Threshold1 (NR serving) must be lower than b2-Threshold2UTRA-FDD-r16 (UTRA-FDD neighbour).
b1-ThresholdUTRA-FDD-r16 (UTRA neighbour add) should not be lower than a2-Threshold (NR serving remove).
For Event Y1 (L2 U2N relay), y1-Threshold1-r17 (serving degradation) must be lower than y1-Threshold2-Relay-r17 (neighbour improvement).
For conditional A5, a5-Threshold1 (serving) must be lower than a5-Threshold2 (neighbour).
threshX-HighQ-r9 must be strictly above threshX-LowQ-r9 for inter-frequency RSRQ reselection priority.
For inter-RAT reselection to UTRA, threshX-HighQ-r9 must be strictly above the lower quality threshold.
The A1 serving-cell quality threshold must be higher than the A2 serving-cell quality threshold to avoid contradictory triggering.
v1-Threshold-r14 should be higher than v2-Threshold-r14 for consistent serving-cell quality triggering.
Both RRCReestablishment and RRCReestablishmentComplete rely on the same rrc-TransactionIdentifier to maintain re-establishment context.
Both IEs relate to inter-RAT cell re-selection and must be configured together.

referenced_entity: inter-RAT cell re-selection parameters (GERAN and CDMA2000)
constraint: Both IEs provide inter-RAT cell re-selection parameters for different technologies; configuring one without the other is incomplete.
The BWP IE must be configured to define the bandwidth part for CSI-ResourceConfig.
ControlResourceSet must be configured with PDSCH-Config when used for MBS multicast.
ControlResourceSet must be configured for SearchSpace to function correctly.
CSI-RS-ResourceConfigMobility must be configured alongside ReportConfigNR for CSI-RS-based measurement reporting.
MeasGapConfig must define the measurement gaps that MeasObjectEUTRA uses.
MeasObjectNR must be configured alongside ReportConfigNR for valid measurement reporting.

referenced_entity: reporting criteria for NR measurement events
constraint: MeasResults must be configured with corresponding ReportConfigNR.
PDCP-Config must be configured with RadioBearerConfig for proper PDCP operation.

referenced_entity: inter-RAT measurement reporting events for UTRA
constraint: MeasObjectUTRA must be configured for UTRA cells referenced in ReportConfigInterRAT.
SIB4 inter-frequency reselection info requires corresponding SIB5 parameters for E-UTRA frequencies.
HandoverCommand relies on AS-Config for source radio resource configuration.
DRX-Config parameters depend on MAC-CellGroupConfig.

referenced_entity: E-UTRA measurement quantities and filter coefficients
constraint: QuantityConfig defines the measurement quantities/filter coefficients for ReportConfigEUTRA.
DownlinkConfigCommonSIB provides common downlink parameters referenced by ServingCellConfigCommon.
RACH-ConfigGeneric parameters are referenced by SI-RequestConfig for Msg1-based SI request.
CSI-ReportConfig references ZP-CSI-RS-ResourceSet for CSI reporting resources.
SIB5 inter-RAT reselection parameters depend on measurements reported in MeasResult2EUTRA.
ULInformationTransferMRDC references PUCCH resource IDs defined in PUCCH-Config.
CSI-ReportConfig references pucch-CSI-ResourceList defined in PUCCH-SpatialRelationInfo.
CSI-ReportConfig references ZP-CSI-RS-Resource for CSI reporting resources.
CSI-SSB-ResourceSet references a ControlResourceSet defined in SearchSpace.
PDSCH-ServingCellConfig references PUCCH resources defined in PUCCH-Config.
NZP-CSI-RS-Resource requires corresponding measurement reporting criteria in ReportConfigNR.
CQI-ReportPeriodic references cqi-ReportConfig defined in PhysicalConfigDedicated.
ControlResourceSet must reference a valid control resource set in PDCCH-ConfigCommon.
SchedulingRequestResourceConfig references a PUCCH resource ID defined in ServingCellConfigCommon.
FeatureSetDownlink references featureSetsDownlink defined in FeatureSets.
CSI-ResourceConfig references NZP-CSI-RS-ResourceSet.
SystemInformationBlockType7 GERAN reselection requires measurement quantities in QuantityConfig.
CSI-FrequencyOccupation references measurement resources in CSI-ResourceConfig.
SecurityAlgorithmConfig must be referenced by AS-Config for correct handover security.
BWP-DownlinkDedicated references servingCellMO defined in ServingCellConfig.
CellGlobalIdUTRA references PLMN-Identity for the network context.
CSI-FrequencyOccupation requires corresponding measurement quantities in QuantityConfig.
Phy-ParametersMRDC provides physical-layer capabilities referenced by UE-MRDC-Capability.
CSI-ReportConfig references NZP-CSI-RS-ResourceSet for CSI reporting resources.
MeasObjectNR requires corresponding measurement quantities in QuantityConfig.
CSI-MeasConfig requires a valid ControlResourceSet defined by SearchSpace.
ConfiguredGrantConfig references a PUCCH resource ID defined in SchedulingRequestResourceConfig.
SystemInformation must include SIB5 to convey inter-frequency reselection information.
UECapabilityEnquiry requests UE capabilities defined in UE-EUTRA-Capability.
CSI-MeasConfig references CSI-RS resources defined in PDSCH-Config.
MobilityFromEUTRACommand requires SIB5 for inter-frequency handover decisions.
SystemInformationBlockType8 requires SystemTimeInfoCDMA2000 for inter-RAT reselection timing.
SchedulingRequestResourceConfig references a PUCCH resource ID defined in UplinkConfigCommon.
UECapabilityEnquiry requests UE capabilities defined in UE-NR-Capability.
SystemInformationBlockType5 includes measIdleConfigSIB for MeasConfig.
SystemTimeInfoCDMA2000 requires CDMA2000 measurement quantity configuration in QuantityConfig.
